reviews.review_title: Trash shovelwar with fake 5 star reviews
reviews.review_description:
Update: still can't damage or knock out npcs. Still a janky mess. Frame rate still bad...what is actually the point of this game???? Oh wait- cash grab .this dev team obviously had nothing to do with the original game.   
Old: Somehow worse than the first game. Sorry. Thought the devs would have improved from the first game but it's exactly the same with worse physics and npc dialog that constantly loops non stop. What's the point of this sequel?  But it's early access so maybe it will improve

i get stuck falling through the map endlessly after playing for a while and the buttons on doors and stuff dont work unless you press them with an object these started happening after one of the big updates a while ago
It was fun at first interacting with stuff and attacking people but it feels like there is a big lack of energy when you play this game

reviews.review_title: Why no Story and gore, dismemberment?
reviews.review_description: No Campaign or Story you just walk around and every NPC feels the same. It gets boring very fast. I expected something more but most of the objects, guns, etc. you can't even pick up because it's not working correctly. And also why is there no gore or dismemberment if you put guns in this game? I see there was some updates but I will revisit it in a couple of months.

ITS SO FUN AND I JUST LIKE THROWING PEOPLE OFF PLACES 
LIKE GANGBEAST

ITS GOOD BUT LOWKEY SHOULD ADD MULTIPLAYER JUST LIKE THE FIRST ONE
It's really fun but it Needs multiplayer
i love the game but i also broke it to 😆😆😆

reviews.review_title: How about you? Add Gore and more places
reviews.review_description: Circus: there was dunk a clown and more.                      Space: you can find aliens and explore planets.                            Shop: you can buy things and steal people things.                        Soccer field: you can play soccer with other people                  multiplayer!: you can play with them and have fun!

I know there's been some complaining about this game. Listen, I've been playing this from the start, and yes it was buggy as hell at first, but the game is steadily improving! They have cars that run people over now! I fought two mummies after drinking too much, that was fun. I love how they somehow made the drunk guy in the Irish pub actually move like a super drunk person, even falling over himself and fighting another NPC. This game is already better than the first, although those carnival games were awesome. There's so many new features with this one!

You can tell in the game that they're working on new areas. But how can they improve if no one plays??

Over time, the game will only improve. Its already improved drastically since it went public. 

These people are making something really special and if y'all would just be patient, I have a good feeling it'll be worth it.
When I first got it I was in love with it i still like it to best game ever made
First of all the fighing sucks theres no blood the charecters dont get knocked out its buggy and they wont even grant me a refund even tho i played for 10 minutes
It’s a really great game. The only thing they need to fix is the hands are too big other than that. The game is perfect. ￼
doorbells elevators computer settings didn't work in the game didn't let me press it horrible game it doesn't work it's basically unplayable it's terrible

reviews.review_title: Its honestly good for its price
reviews.review_description: It’s like a very good sandbox game with a lot of fun stuff to do the map grows bigger after updates and just overall a good game
Very good game but ___________ is feet

reviews.review_title: Good but not as good as the first one
reviews.review_description: It’s very good in my opinion worth the money but it not as good as the first drunken bar fight like in the first one there was multiplayer but in this one there no multiplayer and I like the maps more in the first one but this one has good maps too and graphics it’s js the nostalgia doesn’t hit as hard

Make more spots 
More like the first one
I thought this game was going to be better then the original but i guess not I was lagging and npcs were broking the game just didn't feel right

reviews.review_title: only one because I want the devs to see
reviews.review_description: They need to make the physics better and make more room. I would also like to see the NPCs put up a fight

The sheer amount of AI slop in this game makes it almost unplayable. Posters on the wall, all the signs in the bar, it really is pathetic that they don’t seem to care about using actual artists to create stuff in this game.

Gets two stars bc it’s still in Early Access, the fighting in this game feels kinda “loosey goosey” like punching a mannequin full of jello pudding. Still feels very incomplete, even for an early access game.
this has no gore i need to return it

I got this game whit excitement but it’s just not real enough and it gets boring after u play it for awhile because the map is so small u cant really do that much a bit more blood would make it better and a few map updates like new rooms would make the game a lot better

the violence is non existent, the map is small and boring, the mechanics are crap, gameplay is boring, physics are really bad, health system is confusing and I wish I knew how to refund when I got it. If you want a game like this, get nightclub sim.

By the time i am writing this review i have played around an hour or 2, and if we have to admit 1 thing the game is very repetitive.

Every corner is different made, the music is very loud at the beginning untill you use your smartphone, to pause or eventually shut down the music from start,once you stop the music and you get in a Bar to have a drink then yes you wont hear the music of that Bar cause (remember) you stopped ALL music.

Next to it the gameplay is fun, but really extreme extreme extremely laggy, i had a bar fight, i knocked everyone out, i went outside right before i wanted to go to my appartement, BOOM the game got extremely laggy, all the normal sounds of hitting someone on their head, the car sound, the street sound or eventually the music cMe all at once, i fell through the floor without a ending, and was forced to shutdown
The game is really laggy, i had this issue for 3-4 times, after these issues i closed the game and played something else cause my record was nowhere...

The game had an update but when some NPCs speak above there head it gives an error, while some NPCs has subtitles about what they are saying, now you gotta understand that the game is still in early acces but evenly then some things shouldnt happen that way to be honest.

Some maps are NOT finished, tables and barrels brake somehow at the first hit( am i Goku.?)
NPC's lagg out in walls when dodging, some npcs are not hittable.
Your finger is a pointer, when using your phone the pointer does not work somehow.

So i would really suggest anyone to buy this on discount, it is fun, but the fun part is gone after an hour, cause then you have seen everything, or you need to get on the bar with friends in real life and act like your drinking





Not worth the money now.!

.....

reviews.review_title: Another thing  ruined by the sequel
reviews.review_description: I played this and it was TRASH DONT GET THIS GAME GET THE FIRST ONE

reviews.review_title: Ai, horrible physics and laggy as hell
reviews.review_description: almost every texture (not including npcs) is obviously ai, the game itself is extremely laggy, and i don't think its because of early access because its been like that through multiple updates. The punching is downright horrific, and it fails miserably to capture the essence of the original game that i have had for i think about 4 years now. Dont fall under the assumption its like this because it is early accsess. And please for the love of god do not feed into it. This sequel (it hurts to call it that) is the definition of lazy corporate design and a company who has no care for thier customers, just money. This game does NOT deserve to be called a sequel. And by some miracle the devs respond to this, i would love to see you find a way out of what i have said. And if you just see it and decide to say nothing and leave the elephant in the room not adressed. You've proven my point
Drunkn bar fight 2 is a greeeaat game but it needs to be more like the first game(so it has things like full body tracking)!

Got this game thinking it would be good only 4 maps that are very small and repetitive it’s fun for the first 10 minutes then you’ll never wanna touch it again the physics are bad and they deny refunds
This is a super good game just please add more adds
trash
This game is nothing compared to the first one, I bought it because it on sale played it for about 20 minutes then tried to get a refund because it wasn't very good and my refund was denied...
The game is pretty good, needs more maps though, everyone whining about ai needs to know that there is way more ai in night club sim
One of my favourite VR games just to mess around lol tons of fun
It was really fun the first 5 mins but now there’s not much to do only one map you could go to and you can’t play multiplayer and only 3 bars you can go to and they barely update the game
Hi
It’s says it has blood it has non and it’s way worse than the first one
The soundtrack just gets better and better but there is a lot of bugs too. For a game in early access this is really worth it. I would definitely recommend it if you loved the first one
Great start to an early access game! Love the new gadgets and places to fight. Glitchy and really looking forwards to seeing this game improve

So good! Ignore all negative reviews and buy this game! Sure, it glitches sometimes, but there is no game breaking and the glitches are fun ones. Think of it as goat sim, but with alcohol and lots of pvp. If you like more casual fighting games, this is for you. 14/10, would buy again.
Needs multiplayer mode
Absolutely worth the money and made me giggle like a little girl
I bought it and its soo laggy and i don’t even liked it i cant refund

it’s a little fun when you first get in then it started to lag and lag me out
i played it for like 15 mins and tried to refund it and it said played for more than 2 hours
The game is buggy but its not awful, and can be funny. I just hope that when everything is sorted out they make it multiplayer

This game is fun for me it feels like you’re just a normal guy who likes beer but everybody talks bad about you so you teach them a lesson. I love this game so much oh and can you ad multiplayer on drunken bar fight 2

Do not download this game. It is not like the normal game. It’s just basically the same game but you’re in the nightclub. There was just girls with a really big boobs.
this game is so good
it's a graphics in this game and it's so fun to play

I loaded up this game expecting a fun experience. what I received, however was really bad and you couldn't even knock people out and there was no gore. don't get me wrong I love the destruction physics in this game but there's just like nothing to do involving actual fighting half of it's just like throwing a punch and then they start getting up after like the thousandth one.

This game is so much fun! The best part I like is that you can upload a picture of somebody's face and just use your imagination. I hope they Implement multiplayer that would be even better. Other than that, I freaking love the new update. I'm just glad the devs did not give up on this game. Keep up the good work, guys! Sending positive vibes your way. I hope all are having a great day. Please stay safe
I love games like this where i can destroy things and throw civilians around, there are lots of GREAT features and maps that are more than just enjoyable, they’re a masterpiece.

This game is lovely, this game is the type of game I would play for hours, days, months and won’t get tired of it. The drunkn bar fight 1 was good but this game was in a whole another level, this game has some few bugs and could add more stuff to the game but overall this game is fabulous. If your reading this developers can you add mods to your game it will change your game for the better.

reviews.review_title: My experience with drunken bar fight
reviews.review_description: Its the most worst game for combat or pvp theres no slamming and most of the time your punches dont land at all and the npcs look very weird and when they punch it does alot of damage not recommended do not buy at all buy if you wanna waste your money the developers are lazy and rarely and i mean rarely ever ever make a singular update this update was so bad it made the game look even worser than it already was i hope the developers see this and for the people this game is so bad if you ever bought it and just saw this refund it

This game runs almost smoothly on Quest 2. It has a few little lag spikes but nothing major. The new graphics do look awesome and I love the variety of weapons/maps in the game, I like how it's all one big sandbox map. Only a few bugs and glitches, so I give a 4 star for now.
